QID69:
Welcome to the SHINE pupil mental health and wellbeing survey!



This survey is about you and how you feel. The information you give will be combined with answers from other pupils and used to help your school to plan health and wellbeing activities in your school.



Before you start, we wanted to tell you about the survey:



• It is not a test and there are no right or wrong answers.

• Please answer each question as honestly as you can.

• We do not ask your name. Your school will not be able to identify you.

• For each question, select the answer that best fits how you feel.

• If it is difficult for you to choose an answer, select the answer that is true for you most of the time.

• To continue to the next question, click the next button at the bottom of the page. If you need to go back, click the previous button at the bottom of the page.

• If you do not want to answer a question, select the ‘Prefer not to say’ option and continue on to the next question.



Remember that taking part in this survey is up to you. You do not have to take part if you do not want to. If you have any questions, please ask your teacher.



If you are ready to start, please select Yes below and click the 'next page' button at the bottom of the page.
